finding_results.notes: Replaced the later slogan-style restatement with new investigative payload: Mallick now turns the multi-tamperer insight into a practical reading of how the lies will diverge and records a bedroom/hall traffic question in her notebook. After the Paul re-interview, the closing beat now captures what his answers actually prove and narrows the remaining witness-gap problem instead of repeating the same five-panics formulation. Also corrected the casserole timing to align with the Saturday death call while preserving the beat.

summary: Chapter 10's repeated committee/five-panics insight was compressed into sharper investigative consequence. The initial realization remains, while the later beats now advance Mallick's method and the unresolved bedroom traffic problem instead of re-certifying the same theory.
